title: shuteria involucrata var. glabrata
intro: Shuteria involucrata var. glabrata, also known as a type of flowering plant, is a variety of the Shuteria involucrata species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Shuteria involucrata var. glabrata are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
